title: Jupyter Notebook Change History
description: Configuration for notebook change history and versioning including version tracking settings, history retention policies, change attribution preferences, and version comparison display options.

enableChangeHistory.title: Enable Change History
enableChangeHistory.description: Enable tracking of notebook changes and version history

versionTrackingGranularity.title: Version Tracking Granularity
versionTrackingGranularity.description: Granularity level for version tracking and change attribution

historyRetentionDays.title: History Retention Period
historyRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain notebook revision history

maxVersionSnapshots.title: Maximum Version Snapshots
maxVersionSnapshots.description: Maximum number of version snapshots to retain per notebook

autoSnapshotInterval.title: Auto Snapshot Interval
autoSnapshotInterval.description: Time in minutes between automatic version snapshots (0 to disable)

changeAttributionEnabled.title: Enable Change Attribution
changeAttributionEnabled.description: Track and display which user made specific changes

showUserAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showUserAvatars.description: Display user avatars in change history and version comparison views

displayTimestamps.title: Display Timestamps
displayTimestamps.description: Show timestamps for each change in history views

timestampFormat.title: Timestamp Format
timestampFormat.description: Format for displaying timestamps in history views

historyVisualizationStyle.title: History Visualization Style
historyVisualizationStyle.description: Visual style for displaying version history

versionComparisonMode.title: Version Comparison Mode
versionComparisonMode.description: Default mode for comparing notebook versions

highlightChanges.title: Highlight Changes
highlightChanges.description: Highlight additions, deletions, and modifications in version comparisons

showChangeStatistics.title: Show Change Statistics
showChangeStatistics.description: Display statistics about changes (lines added/removed, cells modified)

enableVersionComments.title: Enable Version Comments
enableVersionComments.description: Allow users to add comments to version snapshots

historyQueryCacheSize.title: History Query Cache Size
historyQueryCacheSize.description: Maximum number of history queries to cache for performance optimization

enableHistorySearch.title: Enable History Search
enableHistorySearch.description: Allow searching through version history by content, author, or timestamp

historySearchIndexing.title: History Search Indexing
historySearchIndexing.description: Enable indexing of history content for faster search performance

exportFormats.title: Export Formats
exportFormats.description: Available formats for exporting version history

enableVersionBranching.title: Enable Version Branching
enableVersionBranching.description: Allow creating branches from previous versions for parallel development

enableVersionMerging.title: Enable Version Merging
enableVersionMerging.description: Allow merging changes from different version branches

enableVersionTags.title: Enable Version Tags
enableVersionTags.description: Allow tagging specific versions with custom labels

compressionEnabled.title: Enable History Compression
compressionEnabled.description: Compress version history data to reduce storage requirements

compressionThreshold.title: Compression Threshold
compressionThreshold.description: Minimum age in days before version history is compressed
